name: taiwan-biz-research
description: Taiwan business-case research, data through recommendation. Data: the NDC business-cycle light with its components (1984-), household income/spending by county and category mix (1976-), listed-company monthly revenue, and export orders — free government open data, with the ROC-year, broken-TLS, and HTTP-200-that-isn't-data pitfalls wrapped. Method: a decision-oriented framework router that says which frameworks Taiwan's free data cannot support, and a multi-agent workflow that scopes a case into falsifiable claims, cross-checks independent sources, and adversarially refutes every claim before it ships.
